name: Service Discovery
description: Find and consume services via a service matcher plus the contact protocol defined in @metamask/service-discovery-types.

ocapCliPath.description: Absolute path to the ocap CLI entry point (.mjs file or binary).

ocapHome.description: OCAP home directory for the daemon this plugin targets (e.g., ~/.ocap-consumer). Passed as --home on every ocap invocation.

matcherUrl.description: OCAP URL for the service matcher (e.g., ocap:abc123@12D3KooW...,/ip4/...).

displayUrl.description: Base URL of the demo-display server (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:7777). When set, the plugin posts service.discovered events so the marketplace pane only shows providers the agent has actually queried.

timeoutMs.description: Timeout for daemon calls in ms (default: 60000).

resetState.description: Clear all plugin state on each register() call (default: false).
